web.title: Claims Guide - Government Employees Medical Scheme
web.description: You can call us on 0860 00 4367 if you would like to know why your claim was rejected. Save yourself the trouble and submit your claim correctly the first time!

web.title: At GEMS, we understand that it is frustrating when a claim is rejected ...
web.description: At GEMS, we understand that it is frustrating when a claim is rejected, and you have to pay out-of-pocket for what is not covered.

web.title: At GEMS, we understand that it is frustrating when a claim is rejected ...
web.description: All claims undergo a strict process to ensure that they are valid and comply with the requirements of the Medical Schemes Act.
